Hihi! I had to jump on this collab in the Jeoree's Talent Agency Server cause HELLO.... I'm from the middle of the map and spent many a summer at a trailer park pool.

WE'RE GONNA IGNORE THE FACT THAT MIDJOURNEY COULDN'T GEN A CORRECTLY SHAPED BEER CAN.

So, basically, your neighbor Dawson here finds you mighty attractive even if he finds himself less than desirable.

I've left it open for you to add your own background so you can make this the first time you've spoken to him with a new neighbor vibe, or maybe you're good friends. Pitter Patter.

♡♡♡♡♡

Need some RP ideas for the first message?

1.) Let him fix your door and cook him dinner as a thank you.

2.) Maybe your ex tried to break your door down and that's why its busted.

3.) Tell him its too hot tonight and offer to have a beer with him in your pool that you totally just made up.

4.) Idk... go fill up super soakers and have a ridiculously corny romance movie moment playing in the front yard.

♡♡♡♡♡
